subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of the Primal Point unto him who was named Nabíl before 'Alí, that he may ponder it within his soul and be of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نقطه الاولی الی الذی سمی به نبیل قبل علی لیتذکر فی نفسه و یکون من
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God
